extra.reason: Preflight complete. Key findings: (1) Snacks host is nvim/.config/nvim/lua/kickstart/plugins/snacks.lua (NOT explorer.lua); uses direct require('snacks').setup{} call not lazy opts pattern. Current picker.sources has only lsp_definitions (lines 49-53). (2) snacks.explorer is NOT enabled — user runs yazi.nvim instead. Left edge uncontested; plan's mutual-exclusion risk no longer applies. (3) No custom picker sources, no name collision risk for 'tabs'. (4) showtabline/tabline not set — defaults apply; T2 will set =0 per plan. (5) <leader>ut/uT/tt all free. <leader>ur (only u-mapping in use) at lua/keymaps.lua:107. (6) No Tab* autocmds exist. (7) lib/worktree.lua style confirmed: header comment, pcall dep check, local M={}, LuaDoc annotations. Mirror this in lib/tablist.lua. (8) Neovim version not enforced in config and nvim --version blocked by hook; T2 will include defensive fallback for getcwd(-1,tabnr). IMPORTANT PATH PREFIX: stow layout means files live at nvim/.config/nvim/lua/... NOT .config/nvim/lua/...

Implemented. Files created: lib/tablist.lua (149 lines). Files edited: snacks.lua (line 53: tabs = require('lib.tablist').source inside picker.sources), options.lua (line 72: vim.opt.showtabline = 0), keymaps.lua (lines 109-111: <leader>ut toggle), which-key.lua (line 69: <leader>u → [U]I group). Mirrors lib/worktree.lua style (single quotes, LuaDoc ---@). Open concerns for T3 verification: (a) picker:norm(function() end) in confirm action is a redundant passthrough (works, but unnecessary for tabnext); (b) Snacks.picker.tabs() callable form depends on snacks auto-registering custom sources as methods — fallback is Snacks.picker.pick({source='tabs'}); (c) headless nvim was blocked under worker hook profile, deferred to T3 via build-runner.

Pivoted. Headless nvim verification blocked by hook profile; interactive verification under XDG_CONFIG_HOME override blocked by missing lazy-lock.json in worktree (git worktree add does not copy gitignored files). User chose to skip worktree for nvim work and apply T2 changes directly to main branch. Replaced by T3b.
Implemented tracked .githooks post-merge auto-restow + nvim-test; docs in CLAUDE.md and references/nvim.md
